message:
fix(pages): scope all storage keys, SW cache, and clear ops per archive URL

storage.js: Major rewrite to namespace every storage key under a per-archive
scope ID (FNV-1a hash of the registration scope URL). Data keys move from
`cass-archive-<key>` to `cass-archive-<scopeId>-data-<key>`; preference keys
move to `cass-archive-<scopeId>-pref-*`. Legacy key constants are kept for
migration cleanup. clearAllStorage/clearOPFS/clearServiceWorkerCache/
unregisterServiceWorker all gain an `allArchives` option so callers can choose
targeted vs. global teardown. OPFS and stats lookups now filter by the
archive-scoped data prefix and db-file set instead of the bare storage prefix.
`isDatabaseCached` drops legacy OPFS file names.

sw.js: Replace the static `cass-archive-v1` cache name with a scope-derived
name `cass-archive-<scopeId>-v3` so each deployed archive owns an isolated SW
cache. Activation cleanup now scopes deletions to the current archive's prefix
to avoid evicting sibling archives. Switch from cache-first to network-first
fetch strategy with a cache fallback for offline resilience.

auth.js: Replace inline localStorage access for the storage-mode preference
with the new `getStoredMode` export. Call `clearStoredSession` before
`persistSession` to remove stale copies from previously selected backends.

settings.js: Tighten confirmation dialog copy to say "this archive's …" so
users understand that clear/reset actions are archive-scoped, not global.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
